expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab tag pipeline v8.12.69 completed deploy and smoke jobs, and production /api/version matches the expected commit/tag.
Deployment smoke confirms the fixed AI Engine build is live; detailed conversational coverage remains represented by deterministic regression tests and the prior targeted evaluation scope.
Cloud Run health reports version 8.12.69 and unauthenticated /monitoring remains protected with 403.

usageChecks.summary: v8.12.69 production deploy after check: effective 17.9292 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 15834.
Cloud Run guardrails intact: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300s, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true, latestReadyRevision=ai-engine-00574-qgq.

artifacts.label: v8.12.69 release smoke command evidence
artifacts.note: Structured release smoke evidence from GitLab pipeline, production /api/version, Cloud Run /health, and usage guard checks.

notes: This run records deployment propagation and smoke evidence only; it intentionally does not count toward aggregate QA summary totals.
P20/P21/P22 logic was covered by local AI Engine regression tests before release, and GitLab tag smoke confirmed the corrected build is deployed.
Interactive conversational AI QA was not rerun as part of this smoke-only record.
